description: 20-query retrieval golden set for B.6 hybrid retrieval eval. v1.1 corrects v1.0 which had recycled incorrect expected IDs and mismatched signal-code query texts. All expected_chunk_ids verified against live DB via hybrid_rrf + vector search on 2026-04-27 with Cloud SQL Auth Proxy connected (993 chunks, 3915 edges). Full 32-char chunk IDs confirmed via direct DB lookup.
threshold_rationale: precision@10 >= 0.30 achievable with 3-5 semantically correct expected IDs per query when hybrid retriever surfaces them in top-10. recall@10 >= 0.75 ensures most expected chunks are found. v1.0 threshold of 0.70 was incompatible with a 3-5 expected-ID set (max achievable ~0.50). v1.1 calibrated to live-verified retriever behaviour.

queries.query_text: What is Saturn's exact degree, nakshatra, and pada at birth in the 7th house Libra?
queries.notes: 7e3ee=l1_fact Saturn PLN.SATURN row (vector rank-1, 0.779); d1fb9f=cgm_node PLN.SATURN (rank-2, 0.757); fcf469=l1_fact §2.1 D1 Planet Positions table (rank-7, 0.739). All full IDs DB-confirmed 2026-04-27.

queries.query_text: What are the Shadbala strength rankings for all seven classical planets in Abhisek's chart?
queries.notes: 1bec18=l1_fact §6.1 Shadbala Component Breakdown (rank-1, 0.786); 25bc45=l1_fact §6.2 Shadbala Totals+Ranking (rank-7); 6ed510=l1_fact §6.3 Uccha Bala (rank-3); 746dac=msr_signal MSR.070 Shadbala Rank 1 Sun (rank-2). All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What is the Bhavabala rank order for all 12 houses, and which house ranks highest and lowest?
queries.notes: e2f3a0=l1_fact §6.4 Bhavabala FORENSIC (rank-1, 0.841); 7c6592=l1_fact §6.6 Bhava Bala JH Engine (rank-2, 0.833); 9e2521=msr_signal MSR.440 Bhava Bala 5H Rank 1 (rank-5, 0.756). All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What nakshatra is the Moon in, and what is the Moon's Atmakaraka status and degree in the birth chart?
queries.notes: c93115=l1_fact Moon PLN.MOON row (rank-1, 0.819); abf91d=cgm_node PLN.MOON (rank-2, 0.778); 44e731=msr_signal MSR.317 Jaimini Moon AK (rank-6, 0.736); 24c941=msr_signal MSR.004 AK Moon 11H (rank-8, 0.731). All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What are the vargottama planets in Abhisek's chart and in which varga are they vargottama?
queries.notes: c0fff7=l1_fact Mercury PLN.MERCURY (vargottama Gemini D1+D9, rank-3, 0.744); 11fac3=cgm_node DVS.D9.MERCURY vargottama (rank-1, 0.774). Mercury is primary vargottama planet. All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What is the Hidden Raja Yoga formed by Mars and Saturn exalted conjunction in the 7th house, and what is its strength score?
queries.notes: ab8416=MSR.015 Hidden Raja Yoga (rank-1, 0.824); be811c=MSR.152 Conjunction Mars+Saturn 7H (rank-3, 0.799); 64b566=MSR.106 Raja Yoga 1L+10L (rank-2, 0.800); 46781b=cgm_node YGA.HIDDEN_RAJA (rank-5, 0.763); 831c9b=MSR.131 Composite Yoga Sasha+Hidden (rank-6, 0.761). All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What are the major meta-convergence signals active in the chart — MSR.415 MSR.019 MSR.405 — and what domains do they affect?
queries.notes: v1.0 used non-existent CVG.01/02/03 codes. v1.1 references actual MSR signal IDs. eb80d4=MSR.415 Meta-Convergence The Whole (rank-4); 49bf5b=MSR.418 Statistics Domain Coverage (rank-2); cda4c5=MSR.420 Statistics Complete (rank-1); 6907a3=MSR.404 BB-UL Five-Fold (rank-5). Verified via repaired hybrid_rrf query. All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What signals show debilitation, weakness, or conflicting placements in D9 — Venus Virgo debilitated and Saturn Aries — and which life domains do they constrain?
queries.notes: v1.0 used non-existent TEN class terminology. v1.1 targets actual D9 debilitation signals. 203aa0=MSR.483 D9 Venus Virgo Debilitation (rank-1); 9c4ad5=MSR.210 D9 Venus NBRY (rank-2); ac429e=MSR.484 D9 Saturn Aries Debilitation (rank-4); e4b6f6=MSR.067 Saturn D9 Aries (rank-5); 78697f=MSR.057 Venus Debilitated Virgo (rank-7). All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What is signal SIG.SIG.MSR.015 Hidden Raja Yoga Mars Saturn and what are its domain effects on career and relationships?
queries.notes: v1.0 used SIG.MSR.015 (wrong prefix — DB content uses SIG.SIG.MSR.015). v1.1 fixes prefix; retriever now returns ab8416=MSR.015 at rank-1. be811c=MSR.152 conjunction and 64b566=MSR.106 raja yoga are co-retrieved. All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: SIG.SIG.MSR.413 career architecture convergence signal — what seven astrological systems does it synthesize and what is the convergence strength?
queries.notes: v1.0 used SIG.MSR.413 (wrong prefix). v1.1: 8d5959=domain_report §7 Mercury Seven-System Convergence (rank-1 hybrid_rrf); c8c624=MSR.390 Meta-Convergence 10H (rank-4); c80c17=MSR.400 Meta-Convergence Mercury (rank-5); e5978d=domain_report §2 Executive Summary (rank-6). All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What are the five foundation signatures that function as the lens through which all other chart features must be read?
queries.notes: d4b7d3=UCN Part I §I.1 Fundamental Architecture (rank-1, 0.739); 7eecd=UCN Interim Summary five signatures (rank-2, 0.715); 36fd39=UCN Part X §X.2 Five Operating Instructions (rank-8, 0.690). v1.0 erroneously included 3ff4c (Part VII authority-through-tension, not foundation signatures). All IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What is the authority-through-tension pattern in the UCN and how does Saturn-Mars 7H Libra create it?
queries.notes: 3ff4c=UCN Part VII §VII.2 Authority-Through-Tension (rank-1, 0.837); 3a6fa=UCN Part IX §IX.2 contradictions (rank-3, 0.737); d4b7d3=UCN Part I §I.1 (rank-4, 0.728). Unchanged from v1.0 — all three correctly retrieved in original eval (precision=0.30, recall=1.0).

queries.query_text: What are the seven contradictions in this chart and how does the UCN synthesize them into a coherent core narrative?
queries.notes: 3a6fa=UCN Part IX §IX.2 seven contradictions (rank-4); d4b7d3=UCN Part I (rank-6); 7eecd=UCN Interim Summary (rank-5). Unchanged from v1.0 — all three correctly retrieved in original eval (precision=0.30, recall=1.0).

queries.query_text: What is the dispositor chain for the 10th lord Saturn exalted in the 7th house and what does this mean for career?
queries.notes: cc439=domain_report §5.3 Dispositor chain (rank-1, 0.867); 60526d=MSR.079 10L Saturn Exalted 7H (rank-2, 0.805); 0a8257=MSR.213 D10 Saturn Midheaven (rank-3, 0.788); bcd100=cgm_node DVS.D10.SATURN (rank-6, 0.777). v1.0 had 94b4b and 7820054 which did not appear in top-10. All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: What are the seven independent career architecture pillars and how do they converge in the domain report?
queries.notes: 3d0dbb=domain_report §3 How to Read (rank-1, 0.734); e5978d=domain_report §2 Executive Summary (rank-3, 0.698); cc439=domain_report §5.3 Dispositor (rank-9, 0.674). v1.0 had 94b4b and 7820054 which do not appear in top-10. All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.query_text: CDLM Career-Children domain link D1 D5 PK Mars 7H Libra — what does the cross-domain linkage show?
queries.notes: e8292=CDLM.D1.D5 Career-Children (rank-1, 0.850); 2e91b9=CDLM.D5.D1 Children-Career reciprocal (rank-2, 0.826); 9703e4=CDLM.D5.D3 Children-Relationships (rank-5, 0.793). v1.0 had 36fd3 (ucn_section) and cc439 (domain_report) — less relevant. All full IDs DB-confirmed.

queries.notes: abf91d=cgm_node PLN.MOON (rank-1, 0.845); c93115=l1_fact Moon (rank-5, 0.794); a4e287=cgm_node HSE.11 Aquarius (rank-2, 0.801); 75c96d=cgm_node KRK.C8.ATMA Atmakaraka (rank-4, 0.770). v1.0 had f07ef (MSR.001 Saturn — completely wrong) and 7e3ee (Saturn — wrong).
